name: Disney's The Jungle Book
aliases: Walt Disney's Classic The Jungle Book

access.notes: SNES version included in Disney Classic Games Collection.

backlog.reason: Included as part of the Disney 16-bit platformer lineage, though weaker than Aladdin and The Lion King.

description: SNES platformer based on Disney's The Jungle Book, sending Mowgli through jungle stages filled with animals, hazards, and collectibles.
